programme.desc: S5 Ep12 Catania: All'ombra del vulcano - Giovanna e Gaspare amano la Sicilia, e sono decisi ad acquistare una seconda casa tra le bellezze artistiche del centro di Catania o tra quelle naturalistiche della sua provincia.

programme.title: Alessandro Borghese - 4 Ristoranti - Stag. 8 Ep. 10 - Alessandro Borghese - 4 Ristoranti S.8 Ep.10 Udine
programme.desc: S8 Ep10 Udine - Ogni chilometro di Udine e provincia parla di passato: Alessandro cerca il miglior ristorante in una dimora storica. Chi tra Marco, Valentino, Federica e Giuseppe vincera' la sfida?

programme.title: Ortigia
programme.desc: S8 Ep11 Ortigia - Spirito antico, animo multiculturale. Nel cuore di Siracusa, Alessandro cerca sapori tra innovazione e tradizione. A Igor, Maurizio, Angela e Mirko il compito di stupirlo.

programme.title: Malta
programme.desc: S6 Ep5 Malta - Bruno Barbieri e' di nuovo all'estero. Stavolta e' a Malta, l'Isola dei Cavalieri, ricca di storia e misteri, crocevia di diverse culture, e dove l'hotellerie di lusso parla italiano.

programme.title: Ep.03
programme.desc: S8 Ep3 - Uno degli ingredienti che non puo' mancare in un matrimonio e' l'attenzione ai dettagli. Lo sanno le spose di questa puntata, che del dettaglio hanno fatto il must have del loro si'.

programme.title: Che il gioco abbia inizio
programme.desc: S1 Ep1 Che il gioco abbia inizio - Dieci sconosciuti salgono su un autobus con i finestrini oscurati. Senza sapere dove si trovano, affrontano delle sfide, ottengono indizi e cercano di individuare la Destinazione X.

programme.title: Il gioco si fa duro
programme.desc: S1 Ep2 Il gioco si fa duro - L'avventura prosegue nel nord Europa, dove non mancano certo i paesaggi e le piste. I concorrenti si rendono conto di quanto sia importante il depistaggio. L'inganno di un giocatore porta alla rovina di un altro.

programme.title: Umbria - Dimore storiche
programme.desc: S6 Ep6 Umbria: Dimore storiche - 4 Hotel torna in Umbria alla scoperta delle sue dimore storiche piu' belle: luoghi tornati all'antico splendore grazie alla passione delle famiglie che li abitano.

programme.title: Lecce
programme.desc: S8 Ep12 Lecce - Il van di 4 Ristoranti circola nel centro storico di Lecce. A Luigi, Christian, Antonella e Daniele il compito di stupire Alessandro tra piatti salentini e specialita' innovative.

programme.title: Ep.04
programme.desc: S8 Ep4 - Le quattro giovani spose protagoniste di questo episodio promettono quattro scatenatissime feste tra amici a base di musica, balli, cocktail e tanta leggerezza.

programme.title: Roma
programme.desc: S8 Ep13 Roma - Al Pigneto, lo spirito romano incontra la fervente modernita'. Alessandro torna nella capitale: parte la sfida tra Luca, Gioia, Romina e Diego!

programme.title: Milano
programme.desc: S8 Ep14 Milano - Eugenio, Fabio, Daniele e Gianni sono i custodi della tradizione gastronomica meneghina! Tra cotolette, risotti e ossobuchi, quale sara' la migliore trattoria di Milano?

programme.title: Ep.02
programme.desc: S8 Ep2 - Chi ha detto che ci si sposa solo a vent'anni? In questa puntata l'amore ha bussato alle porte delle quattro protagoniste, che superano i quarant'anni.

programme.title: Che il gioco abbia inizio
programme.desc: S1 Ep1 Che il gioco abbia inizio - Dieci sconosciuti salgono su un autobus con i finestrini oscurati. Senza sapere dove si trovano, affrontano delle sfide, ottengono indizi e cercano di individuare la Destinazione X.

programme.title: Il gioco si fa duro
programme.desc: S1 Ep2 Il gioco si fa duro - L'avventura prosegue nel nord Europa, dove non mancano certo i paesaggi e le piste. I concorrenti si rendono conto di quanto sia importante il depistaggio. L'inganno di un giocatore porta alla rovina di un altro.

programme.title: Quattro Matrimoni In Italia S.8 Ep.01
programme.desc: S8 Ep1 - Preparate i confetti: Costantino della Gherardesca torna a commentare l'agguerrita competizione tra spose nel giorno del loro matrimonio.

programme.title: Umbria - Dimore storiche
programme.desc: S6 Ep6 Umbria: Dimore storiche - 4 Hotel torna in Umbria alla scoperta delle sue dimore storiche piu' belle: luoghi tornati all'antico splendore grazie alla passione delle famiglie che li abitano.

programme.title: Galatasaray - Liverpool (diretta)
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Turchi reduci dalla sconfitta esterna contro l'Eintracht (5-1). Liverpool dal 3-2 in casa sull'Atletico Madrid. Una vittoria a testa e 2 pareggi nei 4 precedenti. TC: Paolo Redi

programme.title: Il Dna Del Barca: Da Crujiff A Guardiola
Bayern Monaco - Chelsea
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Nei 6 precedenti europei il bilancio, comprese due vittorie ai calci di rigore, e' di 4 vittorie del Bayern Monaco e 2 successi del Chelsea. TC: Pietro Nicolodi

programme.title: Calciomercato - L'originale
programme.desc: Curiosita', commenti, notizie e anticipazioni sui possibili movimenti del calciomercato. Condotto dal trio Alessandro Bonan, Gianluca Di Marzio e Fayna.

programme.title: Inter - Slavia Praga
programme.desc: ... League. - Nerazzurri reduci dalla vittoria sul campo dell'Ajax (0-2). Cechi dal pari in casa contro il Bodoe Glimt. Inter in vantaggio 2 a 1 nei 4 precedenti, un pari. TC: Marianella-Serena

programme.title: Bayern Monaco: Una Squadra Da Record
programme.desc: Trascinato da Harry Kane e sotto la guida di Vincent Kompany, il Bayern Monaco vincitore di Bundesliga e coppa di Germania ha infranto numerosi primati.

programme.title: Calciomercato - L'originale
programme.desc: Curiosita', commenti, notizie e anticipazioni sui possibili movimenti del calciomercato. Condotto dal trio Alessandro Bonan, Gianluca Di Marzio e Fayna.

programme.title: Colpi Da Maestro 03/07/2026
programme.desc: Colpi Da Maestro 03/07/2026

programme.title: Una Stagione Da Ricordare
programme.desc: ... Premier Special. - Cuore, passione e dramma. Il trionfo dell'Arsenal, l'addio di Guardiola al City, i successi in campo europeo di Aston Villa e Palace. Riviviamo una stagione entusiasmante.

programme.title: Calcio Campionato Italiano Serie A - Ep. 65 - Calcio Serie A 22ga Juventus/ Napoli 25/01/2026
programme.desc: Bianconeri quinti dopo il ko contro il Cagliari (1-0). -4 dal Napoli. Azzurri terzi a -3 dal Milan. Due sole vittorie a Torino nelle ultime 15 sfide di A. TC: Zancan-Montolivo

programme.title: Milan - Steaua Bucarest 1989
programme.desc: ... Bucarest UEFA Champions League Story. - La finale di Coppa dei Campioni giocata al Camp Nou di Barcellona il 24 maggio 1989 con i rossoneri allenati da Sacchi che vincono 4-0 con doppiette di Gullit e Van Basten.

programme.title: Eintracht Francoforte - FC Bayern Monaco
programme.desc: ... Monaco Bundesliga. - Dal Deutsche Bank Park di Francoforte, Germania.

programme.title: Diogo Jota
programme.desc: A un anno dalla tragica scomparsa di Diogo Jota e del fratello Andre' in un incidente d'auto, celebriamo la vita e il lascito di una delle figure piu' amate del mondo del calcio.

programme.title: Liverpool - Manchester United
programme.desc: ... Premier League. - Reds reduci da 2 ko di fila (Crystal Palace e Chelsea). Lo United viene dal 2-0 sul Sunderland. Non vince ad Anfield da 9 stagioni, 4 pareggi e 5 sconfitte. TC: Massimo Marianella

programme.title: Diegoooooooo! (1986)
programme.desc: ... Mondiali. - Federico Buffa racconta "Diegooooooooo!". E' il Mondiale di Maradona. Diego segna il gol piu' bello della storia del calcio e trascina l'Argentina al titolo.

programme.title: Inter - Lazio 1998
programme.desc: ... Europa League Story. - Riviviamo la finale di Coppa Uefa della stagione 1997/98. Quarta volta nella storia del trofeo che due squadre italiane si incontrano in finale, ma e' la prima in un gara secca.

programme.title: Chivu: Le Parole Dello Scudetto
programme.desc: Intraprendiamo un viaggio nella comunicazione vincente di Cristian Chivu, allenatore e narratore dell'anima nerazzurra, attraverso le riflessioni della saggista e docente di retorica Laura Suardi.

programme.title: Una Stagione Da Ricordare
programme.desc: ... Premier Special. - Cuore, passione e dramma. Il trionfo dell'Arsenal, l'addio di Guardiola al City, i successi in campo europeo di Aston Villa e Palace. Riviviamo una stagione entusiasmante.

programme.title: Mo Salah - When I Was A King
programme.desc: Dopo nove stagioni, Mo Salah saluta il Liverpool. Compagni di squadra e allenatori, attuali e passati, omaggiano l'attaccante egiziano, 257 gol con la maglia dei Reds.

programme.title: Bayern Monaco: Una Squadra Da Record
programme.desc: Trascinato da Harry Kane e sotto la guida di Vincent Kompany, il Bayern Monaco vincitore di Bundesliga e coppa di Germania ha infranto numerosi primati.

programme.title: Italia - Germania 4-3 (1970)
programme.desc: ... racconta Storie Mondiali. - Federico Buffa racconta "Italia-Germania 4-3". A noi resta l'epica semifinale, ma sotto le stelle del Messico vince la squadra piu' forte di sempre: il Brasile, con 5 numeri 10 in campo.

programme.title: Bayern Monaco - Chelsea
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Nei 6 precedenti europei il bilancio, comprese due vittorie ai calci di rigore, e' di 4 vittorie del Bayern Monaco e 2 successi del Chelsea. TC: Pietro Nicolodi

programme.title: Torino - Milan
programme.desc: Granata senza vittorie da 5 turni, 3 pari e 2 ko. A Torino hanno vinto gli ultimi 3 precedenti. Milan a quota 28 punti con una sola sconfitta (1-2 Cremonese). TC: Compagnoni-Gobbi

programme.title: 24 ore di Le Mans
programme.desc: Guardiamo i momenti migliori alla 24 Ore di Le Mans 2026, mentre le auto e i piloti piu' veloci si contendono la pole position sul Circuit de la Sarthe.

programme.title: GP Olanda: Gara

programme.title: Premier League Years 1992/93
programme.desc: A look back at all of the most memorable moments from the inaugural 1992-93 season in the Premier League. Tottenham's Teddy Sheringham was the league's top scorer.

programme.title: PL Retro: Manchester City v QPR
programme.desc: Title-chasing Manchester City welcome relegation-battling QPR on the final day of the 2011-12 Premier League in a game that would produce arguably the league's greatest moment.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Spurs v United '96
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 1996 and a memorable match between Tottenham and Manchester United at White Hart Lane.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Spurs v ManU '01
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 2001 and a thrilling eight-goal encounter between Tottenham and Man Utd at White Hart Lane.

programme.title: PL Greatest: United v Spurs '12
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, rewind to 2012 and a thrilling five-goal game between Man Utd and Tottenham Hotspur at Old Trafford.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Spurs v United '17
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, a look back to 2017 and a clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United in Spurs' final game at White Hart Lane.

programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the Premier League. Here, a collection of some of the best goals from the 2011-2012 Premier League season.

programme.title: The Best PL Goals: Solo Goals
programme.desc: A series highlighting some of the best goals scored in the history of the Premier League. Here, a look at some of the finest solo strikes.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Arsenal/Spurs 08
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsenal meet Tottenham Hotspur in the north London derby in 2008-09 season, in a match that saw a stunning comeback.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man U/Arsenal '98
programme.desc: Remember a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsenal visit Alex Ferguson's Manchester United at Old Trafford back in the 1997-98 season.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man Utd/Everton 2012
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Man Utd host Everton at Old Trafford in a captivating eight-goal thriller back in 2012.

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:Newc/Leics '97
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic Premier League match. Here, Newcastle United host Leicester City in a seven-goal thriller at St James' Park in the 1996-97 season.

programme.title: FNF: Leeds v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Looking to navigate a tricky spell in the early throws of his West Ham tenure, Nuno Espirito Santo takes his side to Elland Road for a Friday Night Football meeting with Leeds. (24.10)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Separated by goal difference, the Black Cats arrive at the Bridge level on 14 points with the hosts as Regis Le Bris' impressive Sunderland outfit challenge Chelsea on the road. (25.10)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: On song at St James' Park midweek, can an up-and-down Newcastle replicate their European form domestically as Fulham come next for Eddie Howe and co in the Premier League? (25.10)

programme.title: SNF: Man Utd v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, Manchester United host Brighton after a memorable win at Anfield. Ex-United man Danny Welbeck scored twice in his side's win over Newcastle previously. (25.10)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: It's a high-stakes afternoon for Vítor Pereira at Molineux against Scott Parker's Burnley as Wolves target an elusive Premier League victory at the ninth time of asking this season. (26.10)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v N. Forest Hlts
programme.desc: With the Sean Dyche era up and running at Forest, his new side face one of the Premier League's toughest tests on Super Sunday - a clash with Andoni Iraola's Bournemouth. (26.10)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Erling Haaland and Manchester City are the visitors for this Super Sunday clash at Villa. The frightening Haaland notched his 24th goal of the season for club and country midweek. (26.10)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: After a statement win in Europe midweek, Premier league leaders Arsenal welcome Crystal Palace to the Emirates on Super Sunday. The Eagles played an electric 3-3 draw last Saturday. (26.10)

programme.title: PL: Everton v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: A chance for Everton and Spurs to return to winning ways in the Premier League - with both teams tasting defeat last week - as Super Sunday comes from the Hill Dickinson Stadium. (26.10)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: Sean Dyche takes charge of his first Premier League home game at Nottingham Forest with Manchester United the visitors. Ruben Amorim's men target a fourth consecutive league win. (01.11)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: An in-form Burnley come next for the Premier League leaders Arsenal. Claiming four wins on the spin, the Gunners have built a four-point cushion as their title bid gathers momentum. (01.11)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Crystal Palace attempt to iron out a dip in form as Oliver Glasner's side - who have picked up just a point in their last three - take on a buoyant Brentford at Selhurst Park. (01.11)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: In a Premier League clash at the Amex Stadium, Brighton entertain Daniel Farke's Leeds. The visitors, sat in 15th, can leapfrog the hosts with three points here on the South Coast. (01.11)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Fulham host struggling Wolves in the Premier League. Rooted to the foot of the table, it was heartbreak last weekend for Wolves - losing in the dying embers to Burnley. (01.11)

programme.title: SNF: Spurs v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: Saturday Night Football comes from the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium as Spurs host rivals Chelsea. It's the hosts who are the form team, coming from a 3-0 Premier League win at Everton. (01.11)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: On Super Sunday, Newcastle visit the capital for a Premier League contest with Nuno Espirito Santo's struggling West Ham - still searching for their first win under the Portuguese. (02.11)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Stifled at Villa Park, Pep Guardiola's Manchester City face another stern test this Super Sunday with the Premier League visit of Andoni Iraola's Bournemouth to the Etihad Stadium. (02.11)

programme.title: MNF: Sunderland v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Regis Le Bris' Black Cats face Everton and ex-manager David Moyes. It was under Moyes during the 16-17 campaign Sunderland suffered relegation, only now returning to the top fight. (03.11)

programme.title: PL Greatest Games:West H/Spurs '07
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, London rivals West Ham and Spurs meet at Upton Park back in 2007 in a seven-goal thriller that saw some late, late drama.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Manchester United take on Chelsea back in September 2000 in a thrilling game that saw six goals.

programme.title: Premier League Review

programme.title: FNF: Bournemouth v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Sixth in the table and five unbeaten, Andoni Iraola's in-form Bournemouth welcome Marco Silva and Fulham to the Vitality Stadium for a Premier League clash on Friday Night Football. (03.10)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Following a dramatic St James' Park win, Arsenal return to the Emirates for the visit of Nuno Espirito Santo's West Ham - who began life under the Portuguese with a draw at Everton. (04.10)

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: On a pivotal afternoon at Old Trafford, can an under-pressure Ruben Amorim get his Manchester United side firing against impressive Premier League new boys Sunderland? (04.10)

programme.title: SNF: Chelsea v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: The out-of-sorts Premier League champions come next for Chelsea as Liverpool - beaten by Palace and Galatasaray just days apart - visit Stamford Bridge on Saturday Night Football. (04.10)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Forced to settle for a point last weekend at Spurs, Wolves' search for a first Premier League win of the campaign continues on Super Sunday against Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton. (05.10)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Hit for five at City, Burnley face another tough Premier League assignment as Scott Parker's side go to Unai Emery's Villa - finally up and running with last weekend's win. (05.10)

programme.title: PL: Everton v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Oliver Glasner's emphatic Eagles - the only unbeaten Premier League team left this season - arrive at the Hill Dickinson Stadium as David Moyes' Everton entertain Crystal Palace. (05.10)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: A shaky start for Ange Postecoglou sees the Australian still searching for his first Premier League win with Forest, who go to St James' Park on Super Sunday to face Newcastle. (05.10)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Super Sunday comes from the Gtech Community Stadium as Brentford - unbeaten on home soil - host Manchester City in the Premier League. City's neighbours United fell here last week. (05.10)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Newcastle go to the South Coast for a Premier League meeting with Brighton. The Magpies pick up from a 2-0 win over Forest, while the Seagulls come from a draw with Wolves. (18.10)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Finally succumbing to defeat, will Crystal Palace bounce back at home against the hugely impressive Bournemouth, who began the Premier League weekend sat in the top four? (18.10)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: Seven games into the Premier League campaign, promoted sides Burnley and Leeds collide. It's Daniel Farke's Leeds who have enjoyed the stronger start with eight points on the board. (18.10)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Putting an end to Palace's unbeaten run, Everton go to Manchester City next. Despite a useful three points at Brentford, City lost influential midfielder Rodri to injury. (18.10)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Denied a first win of the season in the dying embers against Brighton, an improved Wolves go in search of three Premier League points at the Stadium of Light against Sunderland. (18.10)

programme.title: SNF: Fulham v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, Premier League pacesetters Arsenal head west to face Fulham at Craven Cottage. The Cottagers took two points off the Gunners in this fixture last year. (18.10)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Aston Villla Hlts
programme.desc: Super Sunday comes from the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium as Thomas Frank's Spurs host Unai Emery's Villa in the Premier League. Both teams come from 2-1 wins over promoted opposition. (19.10)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: It's arch rivals Manchester United at Anfield for the Premier League champions Liverpool on Super Sunday. Arne Slot's Reds are looking to end a run of three successive defeats. (19.10)

programme.title: MNF: West Ham v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Rivals from the capital West Ham and Brentford meet in the Premier League on Monday Night Football. Nuno Espirito Santo is without a win in his first two games as Irons boss. (20.10)

programme.desc: In a seventh consecutive win over Jennifer Capriati - including the previous year's final - Serena Williams extended her unbeaten start to 2003 with another Miami Open success.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: Meeting for the first time in a final at tour level, the Williams sisters Venus and Serena went toe to toe in an emotionally charged contest for the Miami Open title.

programme.title: Best of the US Open 2025
programme.desc: With the weight of Wimbledon final defeat lifted, Amanda Anisimova enters a last-four clash with the two-time US Open champion Naomi Osaka - her first Grand Slam semi since 2021.

programme.desc: In the fourth round of the women's singles at the 2025 US Open, Taylor Townsend's dream New York run saw the American take on two-time Grand Slam champion Barbora Krejcikova.

programme.title: Best of the US Open 2025
programme.desc: Crowned Australian Open champion earlier in the year, sixth seed Madison Keys began her 2025 US Open bid on Arthur Ashe Stadium against Mexican Renata Zarazúa.

programme.desc: Two-time US Open champion Venus Williams makes her Flushing Meadows return with an opening-round encounter against the 11th seed Karolina Muchova under the Arthur Ashe lights.

programme.desc: During his eighth appearance at Flushing Meadows, former British men's number one Cam Norrie's US Open campaign continued against 24-year-old Argentinian Francisco Comesana.
